allow: Bash(QT_QPA_PLATFORM=offscreen python -c "import sys; sys.path.insert\(0, 'P:/git_repos/stock_price'\); from PyQt5.QtWidgets import QApplication; from stock_widget import GoldAnalysisDialog; app = QApplication\([]\); dlg = GoldAnalysisDialog\(dark_mode=True\); print\('size', dlg.size\(\).width\(\), dlg.size\(\).height\(\)\); print\('minimum', dlg.minimumSize\(\).width\(\), dlg.minimumSize\(\).height\(\)\); print\('minmax', bool\(dlg.windowFlags\(\) & 16384\), bool\(dlg.windowFlags\(\) & 32768\)\); print\('closable', bool\(dlg.windowFlags\(\) & 134217728\)\); print\('followup_minmax', dlg._followup_input.minimumHeight\(\), dlg._followup_input.maximumHeight\(\)\); print\('tabs_policy', dlg._tabs.sizePolicy\(\).horizontalPolicy\(\), dlg._tabs.sizePolicy\(\).verticalPolicy\(\)\); dlg.resize\(860, 900\); app.processEvents\(\); print\('resized', dlg.size\(\).width\(\), dlg.size\(\).height\(\)\)")

Bash(QT_QPA_PLATFORM=offscreen python -c "import sys; sys.path.insert\(0, 'P:/git_repos/stock_price'\); from PyQt5.QtWidgets import QApplication; from stock_widget import GoldAnalysisDialog; app = QApplication\([]\); dlg = GoldAnalysisDialog\(dark_mode=True\); print\('title', dlg.windowTitle\(\)\); print\('size', dlg.size\(\).width\(\), dlg.size\(\).height\(\)\); print\('minimum', dlg.minimumSize\(\).width\(\), dlg.minimumSize\(\).height\(\)\)")

Bash(QT_QPA_PLATFORM=offscreen python -c "import sys; sys.path.insert\(0, 'P:/git_repos/stock_price'\); from PyQt5.QtWidgets import QApplication; from PyQt5.QtCore import Qt, QEvent; from PyQt5.QtGui import QKeyEvent; from stock_widget import GoldAnalysisDialog; app = QApplication\([]\); dlg = GoldAnalysisDialog\(dark_mode=True\); dlg._analysis_context_message = {'role':'system','content':'x'}; dlg._followup_input.setEnabled\(True\); dlg._followup_input.setPlainText\('hello'\); dlg._update_send_button_state\(\); print\('send_enabled', dlg._send_btn.isEnabled\(\)\); enter_event = QKeyEvent\(QEvent.KeyPress, Qt.Key_Return, Qt.NoModifier\); shift_event = QKeyEvent\(QEvent.KeyPress, Qt.Key_Return, Qt.ShiftModifier\); print\('enter_consumed', dlg.eventFilter\(dlg._followup_input, enter_event\)\); dlg._followup_input.setPlainText\('line1'\); print\('shift_consumed', dlg.eventFilter\(dlg._followup_input, shift_event\)\)")
